infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use the microphone for hands-free navigation help.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to recognize your speech for hands-free follow-up questions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HackberryPi needs photo library access so you can test navigation guidance with saved videos.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use the microphone for hands-free navigation help.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to recognize your speech for hands-free follow-up questions.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access videos for replay testing.
